generated_bronze_script:
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

RUN_ID = 'b6777769-7eb5-4cdf-b45f-7d968b8fc86e'
PIPELINE_VERSION = 'v1'
SOURCE_TYPE = 'adls_gen2'
SOURCE_FEED = 'Vendor1_Deposit'
FILE_FORMAT = 'xml'
TARGET_TABLE = r"bronze.bronze_deposit"
CHECKPOINT_PATH = r"dbfs:/pipelines/checkpoints/bronze/Vendor1/Deposit"
SCHEMA_LOCATION = r"dbfs:/pipelines/schemas/bronze/Vendor1/Deposit"
SOURCE_PATH = r"C:\Users\vaibhavmalik\Documents\Athena-Agentic-\Athena_backend\uploads\adls\Vendor1\Deposit\2026-13-2_0539Deposit_.xml"

df = spark.read.format('xml').option('rowTag', 'Deposit').option('mode', 'PERMISSIVE').load(SOURCE_PATH)
if df.rdd.isEmpty():
    raise ValueError(f'No records found in Bronze landing path: {SOURCE_PATH}')

bronze_df = df.select(
    F.col('TransactionID').cast('double').alias('TransactionID'),
    F.col('User').cast('double').alias('User'),
    F.col('UserName').cast('string').alias('UserName'),
    F.col('UserLevel').cast('double').alias('UserLevel'),
    F.col('groupID').cast('double').alias('groupID'),
    F.col('groupName').cast('string').alias('groupName'),
    F.col('accountingDate').cast('string').alias('accountingDate'),
    F.col('Currency').cast('string').alias('Currency'),
    F.col('total').cast('double').alias('total'),
    F.col('countings').cast('double').alias('countings'),
    F.col('isKit').cast('double').alias('isKit'),
    F.col('authenticationMode').cast('string').alias('authenticationMode'),
    F.col('count').cast('double').alias('count'),
    F.col('endShiftDeposit').cast('double').alias('endShiftDeposit')
) if '*' not in "    F.col('TransactionID').cast('double').alias('TransactionID'),\n    F.col('User').cast('double').alias('User'),\n    F.col('UserName').cast('string').alias('UserName'),\n    F.col('UserLevel').cast('double').alias('UserLevel'),\n    F.col('groupID').cast('double').alias('groupID'),\n    F.col('groupName').cast('string').alias('groupName'),\n    F.col('accountingDate').cast('string').alias('accountingDate'),\n    F.col('Currency').cast('string').alias('Currency'),\n    F.col('total').cast('double').alias('total'),\n    F.col('countings').cast('double').alias('countings'),\n    F.col('isKit').cast('double').alias('isKit'),\n    F.col('authenticationMode').cast('string').alias('authenticationMode'),\n    F.col('count').cast('double').alias('count'),\n    F.col('endShiftDeposit').cast('double').alias('endShiftDeposit')" else df
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_run_id', F.lit(RUN_ID))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_ingestion_timestamp', F.current_timestamp())
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_source_system', F.lit(SOURCE_TYPE))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_source_feed', F.lit(SOURCE_FEED))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_source_file_path', F.input_file_name())
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_source_file_name', F.element_at(F.split(F.input_file_name(), '/'), -1))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_file_modification_time', F.lit(None).cast('timestamp'))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_pipeline_version', F.lit(PIPELINE_VERSION))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_rescued_data', F.lit(None))

target_schema = TARGET_TABLE.split('.')[0]
spark.sql(f"CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS {target_schema}")
bronze_df.write.format('delta').mode('append').option('mergeSchema', 'true').option('checkpointLocation', CHECKPOINT_PATH).saveAsTable(TARGET_TABLE)
